node.title: Which to choose - Meta IC5 or Uber L5A or Atlassian P50 or Microsoft L62?

article.title: Which to choose - Meta IC5 or Uber L5A or Atlassian P50 or Microsoft L62?
article.content:
Hi All,

Meta, Uber, Atlassian - 1 Cr+
Microsoft - 80 L

These are expected numbers from the recruiters, the final number is yet to be provided.

Please help in deciding which one to choose (not in order) based on 

1. Quality of Work 
2. Career Growth
3. Work Life Balance

Location - India

Thanks!

post.content: Can you please share your interview experiences and preparation strategy ?
Based on the ranking you provided, Uber
Meta/Uber hands down\n\nMSFT is a level down
Go for Atlassian, REMOTE work is the best thing for your life!

What is your YOE?\nMy take would have been Microsoft, sure the pay is little low compared to the other two, but if we look at 80L alone, it is not at all less. You get amazing WLB in microsoft with good quality work. The work is even better in Uber but the WLB is trash, where as have been listening too many issues with Atlassian lately like too much PIP culture and toxic competition among team members, also Atlassian was among the top 10 worst rated tech places to work for on the Blind survey.
